item.title: Rolls-Royce Silver Seraph Runs Again
item.description: A Rolls-Royce Silver Seraph gets back on the road after a repair that cost $800. A practical look at keeping a luxury car running.

media:content.media:title: Rolls-Royce Silver Seraph Runs Again
media:content.media:description: A Rolls-Royce Silver Seraph gets back on the road after a repair that cost $800. A practical look at keeping a luxury car running.

item.title: Escalade Fluid Leak Diagnosis in the Shop
item.description: A look at Hoovie's Escalade as it leaks fluid in the shop, with a focus on diagnosis, repair challenges, and what the issue may mean for ownership.
